notes: Shared Rust/Python MCP tool manifest.
Native and Python tools/list declarations are generated from this file.

tools.name: status
tools.title: Status
tools.description: Return the current Loomle MCP, project, and runtime status.

outputSchema.description: Single read-only status snapshot for the MCP process, attached project, and UE runtime bridge.

tools.name: project_list
tools.title: List Projects
tools.description: List Unreal Engine projects known to LOOMLE. Defaults to online projects.

tools.name: project_attach
tools.title: Attach Project
tools.description: Attach this MCP session to an online LOOMLE-enabled Unreal Engine project.

tools.name: project_install
tools.title: Install Project Support
tools.description: Install or update LOOMLE support for an Unreal Engine project, including the LoomleBridge plugin and required project settings.

python.message: project_install is only available in the native LOOMLE CLI. Fab-managed plugins are installed and updated by Fab/Epic Launcher.

tools.name: schema_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Tool Schema
tools.description: Inspect Loomle schema details beyond tools/list: operation-specific edit payloads, full input/output schemas, examples, errors, and notes. Use when schemaHints points here or output/operation details are needed.

operation.description: Optional operation or command name within the tool.

tools.name: context
tools.title: Editor Context
tools.description: Read active editor context and selection.

outputSchema.description: Current Unreal editor location and selection snapshot.

tools.name: execute
tools.title: Execute Unreal Python
tools.description: Execute Unreal-side Python inside the editor process.

tools.name: jobs
tools.title: Jobs
tools.description: Inspect or retrieve long-running job state, results, and logs.

tools.name: profiling
tools.title: Profiling
tools.description: Bridge official Unreal profiling data families such as stat unit, stat groups, ticks, memory reports, and capture workflows.

tools.name: play
tools.title: Play
tools.description: Inspect and control Unreal play sessions; supports PIE status, start, stop, and wait.

tools.name: asset_create
tools.title: Create Asset
tools.description: Create an Unreal asset such as a Blueprint, enum, Material, PCG graph, or WidgetBlueprint.

tools.name: asset_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Asset
tools.description: Inspect an Unreal asset through a kind-specific public surface such as Blueprint, enum, Material, PCG graph, or WidgetBlueprint.

tools.name: asset_edit
tools.title: Edit Asset
tools.description: Edit asset-level metadata. Enum entry editing remains as a compatibility special case.

args.description: Optional envelope for operation-specific fields. For updateMetadata it may contain metadata, removeKeys, or clearMetadata.

tools.name: editor_open
tools.title: Open Editor
tools.description: Open or focus the editor for a specific Unreal asset path.

tools.name: editor_focus
tools.title: Focus Editor Panel
tools.description: Focus a semantic panel inside an asset editor, such as graph, viewport, details, palette, or find.

tools.name: editor_screenshot
tools.title: Editor Screenshot
tools.description: Capture a PNG of the active editor window and return the written file path.

tools.name: blueprint_graph_list
tools.title: List Blueprint Graphs
tools.description: List Blueprint graphs in an asset.

tools.name: blueprint_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Blueprint
tools.description: Inspect a Blueprint overview and route to class, member, and graph detail tools.

outputSchema.description: Blueprint overview. Detailed class contracts, members, graphs, and nodes live on their dedicated inspect tools.

routes.description: Dedicated tools to use for deeper inspection after reading the overview.

tools.name: blueprint_class_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Blueprint Class
tools.description: Inspect Blueprint class contract, settings, default overrides, metadata, and implemented interfaces.

outputSchema.description: Blueprint class contract summary. Member, graph, and node details live on dedicated inspect tools.

class.description: Generated Blueprint class identity and reflected class flags.

settings.description: Class Settings values stored on the UBlueprint asset.

classDefaults.description: Generated class CDO properties overridden relative to the direct parent class CDO.

metadata.description: Metadata maps for the Blueprint asset, generated class, and parent class.

tools.name: blueprint_class_edit
tools.title: Edit Blueprint Class
tools.description: Edit Blueprint class contract such as parent class and implemented interfaces. Use schema_inspect for operation-specific args.

args.description: Operation-specific args. Use schema_inspect with domain='blueprint', tool='blueprint_class_edit', and operation='<operation>' for the exact schema.

source.section: Inheritance, interfaces, Class Settings, and CDO defaults

operations.name: setParent
operations.summary: Set the Blueprint parent class using a UE class path.

parentClassPath.description: UE class path for the new Blueprint parent class.

notes: Read the current parent and revision with blueprint_class_inspect before changing inheritance.

operations.name: setSettings
operations.summary: Set editable Blueprint Class Settings fields.
notes: Only fields present in settings are changed.
Use blueprint_class_inspect to read current settings before editing.

operations.name: setDefault
operations.summary: Set one generated-class CDO property default.

value.description: UE import-text value, or a JSON string/number/boolean converted to import text.

notes: Use blueprint_class_inspect classDefaults to find editable property names and current values.

operations.name: addInterface
operations.summary: Add one implemented Blueprint interface.
notes: Use asset creation or inspection to resolve the generated interface class path before editing.

operations.name: removeInterface
operations.summary: Remove one implemented Blueprint interface.

preserveFunctions.description: Preserve interface function graphs when removing the interface contract.

notes: Set preserveFunctions=true only when keeping implementation graphs after removing the formal interface contract is intentional.

tools.name: blueprint_member_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Blueprint Members
tools.description: Inspect Blueprint members such as variables, functions, macros, dispatchers, events, and components.

outputSchema.description: Blueprint member inventory for one UE member domain.

items.description: Member entries from the requested UE member domain. Entry fields vary by memberKind.

tools.name: blueprint_member_edit
tools.title: Edit Blueprint Members
tools.description: Edit Blueprint members such as variables, functions, macros, dispatchers, events, and components.

memberKind.description: Use schema_inspect with domain='blueprint' and tool='blueprint_member_edit' to list supported memberKind.operation entries.

operation.description: Use schema_inspect with operation='<memberKind>.<operation>' for the operation-specific request schema.

operations.name: variable.create
operations.summary: Create one Blueprint variable.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: variable.update
operations.summary: Update variable metadata, type, default, or replication settings.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: variable.rename
operations.summary: Rename one Blueprint variable.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: variable.reorder
operations.summary: Move one variable before or after another variable.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: variable.setDefault
operations.summary: Set one Blueprint variable default value.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: variable.delete
operations.summary: Delete one Blueprint variable.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: function.create
operations.summary: Create one Blueprint function graph and signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: function.updateSignature
operations.summary: Replace one Blueprint function signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: function.override
operations.summary: Create or confirm an inherited Blueprint override function graph.
notes: Creates an inherited Blueprint override graph using UE's override function class lookup. Do not use function.create for inherited BlueprintNativeEvent overrides.

operations.name: function.rename
operations.summary: Rename one Blueprint function.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: function.setFlags
operations.summary: Update Blueprint function flags and metadata.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: function.delete
operations.summary: Delete one Blueprint function.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: macro.create
operations.summary: Create one Blueprint macro graph and signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: macro.updateSignature
operations.summary: Replace one Blueprint macro signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: macro.rename
operations.summary: Rename one Blueprint macro.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: macro.delete
operations.summary: Delete one Blueprint macro.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: dispatcher.create
operations.summary: Create one Blueprint event dispatcher.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: dispatcher.updateSignature
operations.summary: Replace one Blueprint event dispatcher signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: dispatcher.rename
operations.summary: Rename one Blueprint event dispatcher.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: dispatcher.delete
operations.summary: Delete one Blueprint event dispatcher.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.create
operations.summary: Create one custom event node and signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.updateSignature
operations.summary: Replace a custom event signature.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.addInput
operations.summary: Add one input parameter to a custom event.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.setFlags
operations.summary: Update custom event replication flags.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.rename
operations.summary: Rename one custom event.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: event.delete
operations.summary: Delete one custom event.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.create
operations.summary: Create one Blueprint component.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.update
operations.summary: Update component defaults or editor properties.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.rename
operations.summary: Rename one Blueprint component.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.reparent
operations.summary: Change one component's attachment parent.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.reorder
operations.summary: Move one component before or after another component.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

operations.name: component.delete
operations.summary: Delete one Blueprint component.
notes: Operation names in schema_inspect use memberKind.operation; blueprint_member_edit requests pass memberKind and operation separately.

tools.name: blueprint_graph_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Blueprint Graph
tools.description: Read graph, node, pin, and link data from a Blueprint graph.

view.description: Task-oriented result view. summary returns graph boundary, entry/root refs, chain summaries, and a de-duplicated nodes dictionary. exec_flow traces execution links from rootNode.id and returns lightweight nodes[] plus links[]. data_flow traces data links from rootPin.node.id/rootPin.pin with the same nodes[] plus links[] shape. Use blueprint_node_inspect for exact pins, defaults, and wiring preparation.

direction.description: exec_flow defaults to downstream; data_flow defaults to upstream.

outputSchema.description: Structured Blueprint graph inspection result. The shape is selected by the returned view field.

nodes.description: Dictionary of compact node summaries keyed by node id.

tools.name: blueprint_node_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Blueprint Node
tools.description: Inspect one Blueprint graph node for pins, defaults, node-local state, and edit capabilities.

node.description: Full serialized graph node. Pin/default/link details live under node.pins.

editState.description: Node-local editable pin state used by blueprint_node_edit, such as casePins, execPins, argumentPins, optionPins, fieldPins, or inputPins.

tools.name: blueprint_graph_layout
tools.title: Layout Blueprint Graph
tools.description: Format a Blueprint execution tree from a root node without changing graph semantics.

root.description: Root node id from blueprint_graph_inspect. Layout follows Blueprint exec output pins downstream from this node.

tools.name: blueprint_node_edit
tools.title: Edit Blueprint Node
tools.description: Edit node-local Blueprint structure such as switch cases, sequence pins, and format-text arguments. Use schema_inspect for operation-specific args.

source.document: UE K2 node local pin actions

operations.name: addPin
operations.summary: Add one node-local pin/case/argument through the node's UE-native add-pin action.

role.description: Semantic role from blueprint_node_inspect editCapabilities. Examples: case for Switch, exec for Sequence/MultiGate, pair for MakeMap, argument for FormatText.

name.description: Optional desired name when the node supports named cases or arguments, such as Switch on Name/String or FormatText.

notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: removePin
operations.summary: Remove or hide one removable node-local pin/case/argument by current pin name.

pin.description: Current pin name from blueprint_node_inspect node.pins/editState. Optional only for Select, where UE removes the last option.

mode.description: For SetFieldsInStruct only: pin hides the selected field; otherPins hides all other visible fields.

notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: insertPin
operations.summary: Insert one execution pin before or after a Sequence/MultiGate execution output pin.
notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: renamePin
operations.summary: Rename a node-owned case or argument pin when the UE node exposes a stable backing name list.

pin.description: Current pin name from blueprint_node_inspect node.pins/editState.

notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: movePin
operations.summary: Move a node-owned pin/argument before or after another node-owned pin when UE exposes ordering.

pin.description: Current pin name from blueprint_node_inspect node.pins/editState.

notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: restorePins
operations.summary: Restore node-local pins hidden by UE node field-visibility actions.
notes: Call blueprint_node_inspect first. It returns editCapabilities and the current pin names accepted by these operations.

operations.name: setDelegateFunction
operations.summary: Set the target function/event selected by a Create Event delegate node.

functionName.description: Existing function or event name on the Create Event node's object scope.

notes: K2Node_CreateDelegate setDelegateFunction follows the Create Event node SetFunction plus HandleAnyChange path.
The Create Event output delegate pin must be connected so UE can resolve the expected delegate signature.

tools.name: blueprint_graph_palette
tools.title: Blueprint Palette
tools.description: Search UE Blueprint Action Menu entries for graph node creation.

graph.description: Recommended graph address. Prefer {"id":"..."} when available from blueprint_graph_list or blueprint_graph_inspect; use {"name":"EventGraph"} when id is not available.

tools.name: blueprint_compile
tools.title: Compile Blueprint
tools.description: Compile a Blueprint asset.

graph.description: Recommended graph address. Prefer {"id":"..."} when available from blueprint_graph_list or blueprint_graph_inspect; use {"name":"EventGraph"} when id is not available.

graphName.description: Legacy compatibility graph address. Prefer graph:{id|name} for new calls.

tools.name: blueprint_graph_edit
tools.title: Edit Blueprint Graph
tools.description: Apply explicit local graph edit commands to a Blueprint graph.

graph.description: Graph reference. Prefer graph.name or graph.id over legacy top-level graph fields.

operations.name: addFromPalette
operations.summary: Execute one selected blueprint_graph_palette entry.
notes: entry should be the full object returned by blueprint_graph_palette.

operations.name: connect
operations.summary: Create one explicit pin link.

operations.name: disconnect
operations.summary: Remove one explicit pin link.

operations.name: insertExec
operations.summary: Insert one node into an existing exec link.
notes: insertExec requires an existing direct exec link from from to to.
The inserted node can be an alias created earlier in the same graph.edit request.

operations.name: bypassExec
operations.summary: Remove one exec-chain node while preserving the surrounding exec chain.
notes: bypassExec replaces upstream -> node -> downstream with upstream -> downstream.
The bypassed node is removed after the replacement link is created.

operations.name: breakLinks
operations.summary: Remove all links from one pin.

operations.name: setPinDefault
operations.summary: Set one editable pin default.
notes: setPinDefault must not implicitly break links.
For object/class pins, pass value.object. Blueprint asset paths resolve to their generated class when the target pin requires a class.
Class pin updates trigger UE node-specific PinDefaultValueChanged behavior so construct/spawn nodes rebuild dependent pins.

operations.name: removeNode
operations.summary: Remove one node.

operations.name: moveNode
operations.summary: Move one node by absolute position or delta.

operations.name: addCommentBox
operations.summary: Create one comment box.

operations.name: addReroute
operations.summary: Create one reroute node for wire organization.

operations.name: setNodeComment
operations.summary: Set one node comment.

operations.name: duplicateNode
operations.summary: Duplicate one node.

operations.name: reconstructNode
operations.summary: Ask UE to reconstruct one node.

operations.name: setNodeEnabled
operations.summary: Set one node enabled state.

tools.name: material_list
tools.title: List Material Expressions
tools.description: List material expressions in a Material asset.

tools.name: material_graph_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Material Graph
tools.description: Read expression nodes and pin data from a Material graph.

tools.name: material_graph_edit
tools.title: Edit Material Graph
tools.description: Apply explicit local edit commands to a Material graph. Use material_palette for node creation.

commands.description: Ordered Material graph edit commands. Each command requires kind. Use schema_inspect with domain='material' and tool='material_graph_edit' for command-specific schemas.

source.document: UE Material Editor palette and expression graph actions

operations.name: addFromPalette
operations.summary: Create one Material expression node from a selected material_palette entry.
notes: Use material_palette first and pass the full selected entry. Do not guess expression classes in public calls.

operations.name: removeNode
operations.summary: Remove one Material expression node.
notes: removeNode does not auto-heal surrounding graph structure.

operations.name: moveNode
operations.summary: Move one Material expression node by absolute position or delta.
notes: Use exactly one of position or delta.

operations.name: connect
operations.summary: Create one explicit Material expression or root pin link.
notes: Material root inputs are addressed as node id __material_root__.

operations.name: disconnect
operations.summary: Remove one explicit Material expression or root pin link.

operations.name: breakPinLinks
operations.summary: Remove all links from one Material expression or root pin.
notes: breakPinLinks removes links only; it does not create replacement values.

tools.name: material_graph_layout
tools.title: Layout Material Graph
tools.description: Format an explicit Material graph node selection without changing graph semantics.

tools.name: material_compile
tools.title: Compile Material
tools.description: Compile a Material asset and return diagnostics.

tools.name: material_node_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Material Node
tools.description: Inspect one Material expression instance or expression class for pins and editable properties.

tools.name: material_node_edit
tools.title: Edit Material Node
tools.description: Set one editable property on a Material expression node.

tools.name: material_palette
tools.title: Material Palette
tools.description: Search UE Material Editor palette actions for expression node creation.

graph.description: Optional Material graph reference. For Material this currently resolves to graph.assetPath.

query.description: Case-insensitive fuzzy search over UE Material palette label, category, tooltip, keywords, and action payload.

elementTypes.description: UE Material palette element families to include. Defaults to all.

tools.name: pcg_palette
tools.title: PCG Palette
tools.description: Search UE PCG graph palette actions for node creation.

graph.description: Optional PCG graph reference. For PCG this currently resolves to graph.assetPath.

query.description: Case-insensitive fuzzy search over UE palette label, category, tooltip, keywords, and action payload.

elementTypes.description: UE PCG palette element families to include. Defaults to all.

tools.name: pcg_graph_inspect
tools.title: Inspect PCG Graph
tools.description: Read PCG graph nodes, pins, links, and defaults with task-oriented views.

tools.name: pcg_node_inspect
tools.title: Inspect PCG Node
tools.description: Inspect one PCG node instance or settings class for editable pins and properties.

tools.name: pcg_parameter_inspect
tools.title: Inspect PCG Parameters
tools.description: Inspect PCG graph user parameters exposed by the graph's Parameters panel.

graph.description: Optional PCG graph reference. For PCG this currently resolves to graph.assetPath.

tools.name: pcg_parameter_edit
tools.title: Edit PCG Parameters
tools.description: Edit PCG graph user parameters. Use schema_inspect for operation-specific args.

operations.name: create
operations.summary: Add a graph user parameter to the PCG graph Parameters bag.

value.description: Optional UE serialized default value, set with a follow-up setDefault if omitted.

operations.name: update
operations.summary: Change an existing graph user parameter type/container while preserving values when UE can migrate them.

operations.name: rename
operations.summary: Rename a graph user parameter and let PCG update parameter getter references.

operations.name: delete
operations.summary: Remove a graph user parameter from the Parameters bag.

operations.name: setDefault
operations.summary: Set a graph user parameter default value using UE serialized value text.

tools.name: pcg_compile
tools.title: Compile PCG Graph
tools.description: Validate and compile-confirm a PCG graph after edits.

graph.description: Optional PCG graph reference. For PCG this currently resolves to graph.assetPath.

tools.name: pcg_graph_edit
tools.title: Edit PCG Graph
tools.description: Apply explicit local edit commands to a PCG graph. Use pcg_palette for node creation.

operations.name: addFromPalette
operations.summary: Create one PCG node from a selected pcg_palette entry.
notes: Use pcg_palette first and pass the full selected entry. Do not guess settings classes in public calls.

operations.name: removeNode
operations.summary: Remove one PCG node.

operations.name: moveNode
operations.summary: Move one PCG node by absolute position or delta.

operations.name: connect
operations.summary: Create one explicit PCG pin edge.

operations.name: disconnect
operations.summary: Remove one explicit PCG pin edge.

operations.name: setPinDefault
operations.summary: Set one PCG pin default value.

operations.name: setNodeProperty
operations.summary: Set one property on a PCG node settings object.

tools.name: pcg_graph_layout
tools.title: Layout PCG Graph
tools.description: Format an explicit PCG graph node selection without changing graph semantics.

tools.name: widget_palette
tools.title: Widget Palette
tools.description: Search UE Widget Palette entries for UMG widget creation.

assetPath.description: Optional WidgetBlueprint asset path. Widget Palette search is mostly global; this is reserved for context-specific filtering.

query.description: Case-insensitive fuzzy search over UE Widget Palette label, category, tooltip, keywords, and payload.

elementTypes.description: Widget Palette entry families to include. Defaults to all.

tools.name: diagnostic_tail
tools.title: Diagnostic Tail
tools.description: Read persisted structured diagnostics incrementally by sequence cursor.

tools.name: log_tail
tools.title: Log Tail
tools.description: Read persisted Unreal output log events incrementally by sequence cursor.

tools.name: widget_tree_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Widget Tree
tools.description: Read the UMG WidgetTree of a WidgetBlueprint asset.

view.description: outline returns hierarchy and widget identity; layout also includes slot/layout details.

names.description: Exact widget names to return in matches.

text.description: Case-insensitive fuzzy search over serialized widget tree entries.

tools.name: widget_tree_edit
tools.title: Edit Widget Tree
tools.description: Apply explicit local edit commands to a WidgetBlueprint WidgetTree. Use widget_palette for widget creation.

commands.description: Ordered WidgetTree edit commands. Each command requires kind. Use schema_inspect with domain='widget' and tool='widget_tree_edit' to list supported command kinds. For a command-specific schema, call schema_inspect with operation=<kind>. Use widget_palette first and pass the selected entry to addFromPalette instead of guessing widget classes.

items.description: Command envelope. Command-specific fields are intentionally omitted from tools/list and documented through schema_inspect.

source.document: UE UMG WidgetTree and Widget Palette

operations.name: addFromPalette
operations.summary: Create one UMG widget from a selected widget_palette entry.
notes: Use widget_palette first and pass the full selected entry. Do not guess widget classes in public calls.
parent may be omitted only when creating the root widget.

operations.name: removeWidget
operations.summary: Remove one widget from the WidgetTree.
notes: Removing a panel also removes its child widgets.

operations.name: renameWidget
operations.summary: Rename one widget in the WidgetTree.
notes: Renaming preserves the widget object, slot, layout, style, properties, and bindings.
Use target.name for the current widget name and name/newName for the destination name.

operations.name: reparentWidget
operations.summary: Move one widget under a different parent widget.
notes: slot values are panel-slot properties and depend on the new parent widget type.

operations.name: setIsVariable
operations.summary: Set whether one WidgetTree widget is exposed as a Blueprint variable.
notes: This is a WidgetBlueprint structure operation, not a reflected widget property edit.

tools.name: widget_edit
tools.title: Edit Widget
tools.description: Apply explicit local property edit commands to WidgetTree widget instances. Use widget_inspect to discover writable property names and serialized value expectations.

commands.description: Ordered widget instance edit commands. Each command requires kind. Use schema_inspect with domain='widget' and tool='widget_edit' to list supported command kinds.

items.description: Command envelope. Command-specific fields are intentionally omitted from tools/list and documented through schema_inspect.

source.document: UE UMG Widget and PanelSlot reflected properties

operations.name: setProperty
operations.summary: Set one reflected property on a widget instance.
notes: Use widget_inspect to discover editable widget property names and serialized value expectations.

operations.name: setSlotProperty
operations.summary: Set one reflected property on a widget's current UPanelSlot.
notes: Slot properties depend on the current parent panel. Use widget_tree_inspect view='layout' or instance-mode widget_inspect to discover the slot class and values.

tools.name: widget_event_create
tools.title: Create Widget Event
tools.description: Create or return the native component-bound event node for one WidgetBlueprint widget event, such as a Button OnClicked event.

event.description: Multicast delegate property name on the widget class, such as OnClicked.

created.description: True only when this call created a new native component-bound event node.

existing.description: True when the event node already existed before this call.

wouldCreate.description: True when no existing node was found. In dryRun mode the node is not created.

nodeId.description: Created or existing graph node GUID for follow-up Blueprint graph operations.

tools.name: widget_inspect
tools.title: Inspect Widget
tools.description: Inspect one UMG widget class or WidgetTree instance for editable properties.

widgetClass.description: UMG widget class path or short class name, such as /Script/UMG.TextBlock or TextBlock.

assetPath.description: WidgetBlueprint asset path when inspecting a concrete WidgetTree instance.

tools.name: widget_compile
tools.title: Compile Widget Blueprint
tools.description: Compile a WidgetBlueprint and return diagnostics.
